publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-09-25 00:13:38 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Library. Department of Rare Books

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Correspondence files and monthly and annual reports of the Cornell Rare Books Department. Also, exhibit files from previous exhibits, including cards from an early Lafayette exhibition.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University Library Department of Rare Books Records, #13-6-1673. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.p: includes celluloid envelopes
